description: Happy path: scan YouTube competitors for a moody bedroom makeover topic with full inputs

expect.competitors: array of up to 5 objects each with name, url_if_found, estimated_scale, content_angle, gap_or_differentiation

prohibit: competitors array has more than 5 entries when count is 5
exact subscriber counts, view counts, or engagement rates stated as confirmed fact without [unverified] marker
channel names or video titles that are fabricated and not sourced from retrieval
estimated_scale value without [unverified] unless confirmed by a live API

description: Minimal input: default count of 5, Pinterest platform for vintage thrift flip
prohibit: competitors array has more than 5 entries (default count is 5)
fabricated pin engagement stats or save counts stated as fact
url_if_found containing invented URLs not sourced from retrieval

description: Edge case: retrieval largely fails; confidence must be low, slots replaced with gap-record objects

expect.retrieval_gaps: non-empty array documenting what could not be retrieved

prohibit: confidence is high when retrieval largely failed
competitors array filled with fabricated creator names or accounts to reach the requested count
retrieval_gaps is empty when most slots could not be populated from retrieval
fabrication_flags is empty when unverified data is present
